questionHtml: Using only the edges obtained in your answer to part (b), find an upper bound for the travelling salesman problem.
markschemeHtml:
2×MST weight          (M1)

=$336          A1

 

Note: Allow any integer multiple (>1) of MST weight for M1, and if correctly calculated, award M1A1.

 

[2 marks]
